name: warming_trend_pre_cool_nat_vent_bypass
description: Strong warming trend night with nat-vent success: setback_modifier=-3.0. Nat-vent window closes at ~01:30 and the home is already at 74F (below pre-cool target 75F). Pre-cool trigger fires 30min later at 02:00 with nat_vent_just_closed=True. handle_pre_cool() detects indoor(74F) <= target(75F) and suppresses AC — free cooling via open windows already banked the needed thermal mass. Occupant experience: same cool morning achieved with zero AC energy cost.
notes: Natural vent configured — nat-vent close triggers the primary path (not wake_time-4h fallback).
Nat-vent bypass condition: nat_vent_just_closed=True AND indoor_f(74.0) <= target(75.0).
Both conditions met → pre_cool_suppressed_nat_vent event emitted; no set_temperature call.
Scenario effectiveness: if the nat-vent bypass is deleted from handle_pre_cool(),
the engine emits pre_cool_applied instead of pre_cool_suppressed_nat_vent —
the assertion fails and the regression is caught (wasted AC energy that nat-vent already handled).

events.note: Strong warming trend. Modifier=-3.0 seeds pre-cool target of 75F.
Evening — AC holding indoor near comfort band.
Bedtime: sleep band [66/78] applied. Nat-vent expected to open overnight.
Overnight: outdoor cooled to 65F, indoor 74F. Nat-vent has been cooling the home (simulated as temp_update; nat-vent open/close sequence deferred to integration track).
Pre-cool trigger fires after nat-vent close (nat_vent_close + 30min path). indoor=74F <= target=75F. Nat-vent bypass: suppress AC, free cooling achieved target.

assertions.reason: Bedtime sleep band [66/78] — ceiling=78F for cool mode. Nat-vent and pre-cool both pending.

Pre-cool trigger fired with nat_vent_just_closed=True and indoor(74F) <= target(75F). AC suppressed: free cooling via open windows already banked the thermal mass. No energy wasted running AC when nat-vent did the job.

verdict.summary: Nat-vent cooled home to 74F before pre-cool trigger; AC correctly suppressed because free cooling already achieved the pre-cool target of 75F
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (74F) → setback_applied (78F sleep ceiling) → pre_cool_suppressed_nat_vent (no AC call, indoor=74F)
verdict.expected_behavior: When nat-vent brings indoor to or below the pre-cool target before the trigger fires, handle_pre_cool() emits pre_cool_suppressed_nat_vent and skips the AC service call. Occupant experience: same cool morning as warming_trend_pre_cool_applied, but at zero AC energy cost thanks to overnight nat-vent.
